labels.name: approved-for-fix
labels.description: Maintainer approval: the fix poller may implement this issue

labels.name: fix-in-progress
labels.description: A fix-poller run has claimed this issue

labels.name: fix-failed
labels.description: An automated fix run failed and needs a human look

labels.name: approved-for-review
labels.description: Maintainer approval: the fix poller may run review-fix on this pull request

labels.name: review-in-progress
labels.description: A fix-poller review run has claimed this pull request

labels.name: review-failed
labels.description: An automated review run failed and needs a human look

labels.name: needs-clarification
labels.description: An agent paused on a question; answering resumes the cycle

labels.name: deferred-finding
labels.description: Deferred review finding filed by a review-fix cycle
